name: Boiled Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:10
1. Combine sugar, cream of tartar, salt, and water in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until clear.
3. Continue cooking without stirring to soft ball stage (240 degrees).
4. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form; gradually add syrup mixture.
5. Add flavorings; continue beating until stiff peaks form and frosting is thick enough to spread.
6. Yield: 7 cups.
